pi_items.source: Confirmed by reading setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which expect outputs in this directory.
Confirmed by export_result.sh, which checks for the existence of these exact filenames.
Code analysis of verifier.py shows scoring weights are actually 40 for data validation and 10 for visualization, differing from the 30/20 claimed in task.json.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating analysis outputs for the Muncie HEC-RAS model in /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results. The expected files are geometry_containment.csv, critical_sections.json, and containment_profile.png. The scoring weights claimed in task.json (data_accuracy: 30, plot_creation: 20) are contradicted by verifier.py, which assigns 40 points to data validation and 10 points to visualization.
